page: Google Cloud Platform a3-edgegpu-8g is an accelerator-optimized server configured with eight NVIDIA H100 GPUs from the Hopper architecture, delivering a total of 637 GB of VRAM. The host system is powered by dedicated Intel Xeon 8481C processors with 208 vCPUs (104 physical cores) running at 2.7 GHz, supported by 1872.0 GB of system memory (9.0 GB per core) and 6432 GB of local NVMe SSD storage.

Benchmark results place this server in the top tier (top 10%) for multi-core CPU performance, passmark CPU score, and large-block memory bandwidth (431.78 GB/sec read and 185.98 GB/sec write). It also achieves top-tier results in database operations and Redis SET operations, reaching 177.5 million operations per second. However, single-core CPU performance falls into the average category (middle 50%), indicating a clear tradeoff where workloads must be highly parallelized to leverage the hardware effectively.

Given the high density of GPU accelerators, massive system memory, and local NVMe storage, this server is designed for large-scale parallel processing tasks. It is suited for large language model (LLM) training and inference, multi-threaded data decompression, and high-throughput database operations. From a qualitative cost perspective, the consolidation of eight enterprise-grade GPUs and high-capacity local NVMe SSDs represents a high-density resource profile suited for specialized, compute-heavy workloads rather than general-purpose hosting.
description: Google Cloud Platform a3-edgegpu-8g is an accelerator-optimized server featuring eight NVIDIA H100 Hopper GPUs with 637 GB of total VRAM, paired with 208 vCPUs from dedicated Intel Xeon 8481C processors. The hardware configuration includes 1872.0 GB of system memory and 6432 GB of local NVMe SSD storage. In benchmark testing, the server demonstrates top-tier (top 10%) multi-core CPU performance, large-block memory bandwidth, and database operations, though its single-core CPU performance remains in the average tier. This resource-dense profile is designed for highly parallelized workloads, including large language model inference, multi-threaded data processing, and high-throughput database operations.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform a3-edgegpu-8g is an accelerator-optimized server featuring 8 NVIDIA H100 GPUs, 208 vCPUs, 1872GB RAM, and 6432GB NVMe SSD storage for highly parallelized workloads.
meta_description: Google Cloud Platform a3-edgegpu-8g features 8 NVIDIA H100 GPUs, 208 vCPUs, and 1872GB RAM, built for parallel compute and database workloads.
tagline: An accelerator-optimized architecture combining eight enterprise GPUs, massive system memory, and high-speed local NVMe storage for parallel computing workloads.
bullet_points: Equipped with 8 NVIDIA H100 Hopper GPUs providing 637 GB of total VRAM.
Features 208 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs and 1872 GB of system memory.
Includes 6432 GB of high-speed local NVMe SSD storage.
Delivers top-tier multi-core CPU and large-block memory bandwidth performance.
Suited for large language model inference and high-throughput database operations.
